description_long: This is an ornate, three-armed candelabrum with a tall, slender central stem and a wide, stable base. The lamp features three candle holders, each supported by elegantly curved arms that branch symmetrically from the central column. The design is highly decorative, with intricate scrollwork on the arms and a flared, faceted base that adds to its visual appeal. The surface appears to be made of polished black metal, giving it a glossy and reflective finish. The overall style is reminiscent of classical or vintage European candle holders, often found in upscale urban parks, plazas, or historical districts. Its structure is both functional and decorative, suitable for holding candles and serving as a striking visual accent.
description: An ornate, black metal candelabrum with three candle holders and decorative scrollwork arms, featuring a tall central stem and a wide, faceted base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of three candle holders and the ornate scrollwork arms branching from the central stem.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the depth of the scrollwork and the curvature of the arms, with all three holders visible.
description_view_2: Another angled view emphasizing the central stem's height and the elegant, balanced design of the arms and base.
description_view_3: View from the opposite side, mirroring the front with the same decorative features and symmetrical arm arrangement.
